nasb.text: “A wicked thing is poured out upon him, That when he lies down, he will not rise up again.”

esv.text: They say, “A deadly thing is poured out on him; he will not rise again from where he lies.”

cnv.text: “有惡疾臨到他身上； 他既然躺下了，就必一病不起。”

ccb.text: 他们说：“他患了恶病， 再也起不来了！”

csbs.text: “恶疾已临到他身上， 他躺下就再也不会起来！”
